evals.prompt: I want to import a new VPN subscription from https://example.com/sub.yaml and start using it. Walk me through the exact commands to import it, switch to it, and get the proxy running.
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step instructions using correct clash-verge-cli commands: profile import --url, profile use, core generate, core start, proxy enable

evals.prompt: My clash core stopped working after I updated a profile. How do I restore my last backup using clash-verge-cli?
evals.expected_output: Instructions to list backups, identify latest, and run backup restore with correct flags

evals.prompt: I need a bash script that checks if the clash core is running and, if not, finds the profile with 'fast' in the name and switches to it before starting the core.
evals.expected_output: Bash script using --json flag, jq for parsing, core status check, profile list filtering, profile use, core generate, core start
